nasb.text: We had a dream on the same night, he and I; each of us dreamed according to the interpretation of his own dream.

esv.text: we dreamed on the same night, he and I, each having a dream with its own interpretation.

cnv.text: 我們二人在同一夜都作了夢；我們的夢各有不同的解釋。

ccb.text: 一天晚上，我俩都做了梦。

csbs.text: 在同一夜，我和他都做了梦，各梦各有其解。
